title: Pan Seared Crispy Venezuelan Fries Skewers
description: A sweet and crispy Venezuelan dish featuring robata-grilled fries, served in a ramekin, perfect for a midnight craving. This satvik-friendly recipe is easy to make and delicious to eat.

ingredients.name: potatoes
ingredients.notes: peeled and cut into fry shapes

instructions: Preheat the robata grill to 400 degrees Fahrenheit.
In a large bowl, toss the potato fries with vegetable oil, salt, black pepper, garlic powder, and paprika until they are evenly coated.
Thread the potato fries onto skewers, leaving a small space between each fry.
Grill the skewers for 10 minutes, turning occasionally, until the fries are crispy and golden brown.
In a small bowl, mix together sugar and lime juice until well combined.
Brush the sugar and lime juice mixture onto the grilled fries.
Serve the fries in a ramekin, garnished with chopped cilantro.
Pan sear the fries in a little oil for an extra crispy exterior.
